visualGoal: Let a space-sim pilot pick HOSAS vs HOTAS by their actual game (Star Citizen → HOSAS, Elite → HOTAS competitive, DCS → HOTAS, Xbox → single stick) and player type, using verified product proof only. Anchor the visuals on the four verified sticks/throttle that exemplify each config; honestly keep WinWing and the space-path Turtle Beach text-only rather than embedding unverified images.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: The Xbox/console pick. Kept text-only. Either whitelist the space-path image after vision-verifying it's the identical product, or reuse the verified flight-bay image, before embedding a gearpick.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic enthusiast space-sim desk under cool magenta and cyan rim light, split-composition editorial cover: left half a clean twin-stick HOSAS layout with two empty ergonomic mounting plates left open for real joystick product overlays, right half a stick-and-throttle HOTAS layout with two empty plates, dual-monitor Star Citizen cockpit view behind, cable management visible, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text, 16:9.
